backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Nellore Print Hub backend, defining all data types (quotations, projects, reviews, chat, admin users) and state maps, with blob storage and authorization mixins included.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old AdminInvitationEntry (non-optional invitedBy) to the new shape (optional invitedBy), and seeds a permanent hardcoded admin if no admins exist.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the admin login page pre-fill and auto-seeding feature to its implementation files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, used as build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app at #root and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines all TanStack Router routes and the RootLayout component, which conditionally shows the ProfileSetup dialog for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks authentication and admin status, rendering children only for verified admins and showing appropriate prompts or redirects otherwise.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Renders a fixed mobile bottom navigation bar with links to main app routes and a chat button, showing a lock indicator on the reviews tab when the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx: A modal bottom sheet component that slides up from the bottom of the screen, locks body scroll while open, and optionally displays a title with a close button.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheetSelec: A form select component that opens a BottomSheet with a list of options, triggering haptic feedback on selection and displaying the chosen value in a button trigger.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A floating chat widget that allows authenticated users to send and view messages, displaying a login prompt for unauthenticated users and sorting messages chronologically.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: A small toggle button that switches the app language between English and Telugu, using haptic feedback on click.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout wrapper providing a sticky header with logo, language toggle, share button, and admin access icon, plus a footer and mobile bottom navigation with chat widget integration.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/NegotiationHisto: Displays a scrollable chat-style history of negotiation messages between a customer and admin, with distinct styling for each sender side.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog form for first-time users to enter their name, email, and mobile number, saving the profile via a mutation hook with validation and haptic feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProjectDetailMod: A modal dialog component that displays detailed information about a project, including its image, title, category badge, description, and completion date, with bilingual (English/Telugu) support.
frontend/src/components/PullToRefreshCon: A wrapper component that adds pull-to-refresh functionality to its children using touch events, showing a spinner indicator during the pull and refresh states.
frontend/src/components/ShareAppButton.t: A button component that shares the app URL using the Web Share API or falls back to clipboard copy, with bilingual label support and haptic feedback.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: A loading skeleton placeholder component that renders animated shimmer cards in four variants: project, review, quotation, and a default service layout.
frontend/src/components/SwipeContainer.t: A wrapper component that enables horizontal swipe-based navigation by translating its children along the X-axis in response to touch gestures.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: A React context provider that manages the app's language state (English or Telugu), persisting the selection to localStorage and exposing toggle and set functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: A hook that queries the backend to determine whether the currently authenticated caller has admin privileges, accounting for actor and identity loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: A hook that exposes a mutation for verifying admin credentials by hashing the password with SHA-256 and calling the backend's verifyAuthentication method.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExists.ts: A hook that queries the backend to check whether any admin users exist by fetching the admin user count.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInvitations.t: Provides hooks for fetching existing admin invitations and inviting new admin users by hashing their password and calling the backend, with query invalidation on success.
Provides hooks for registering the first Internet Identity admin and seeding the first admin's email/password credentials, with query invalidation and toast notifications on completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: Provides hooks for biometric (WebAuthn) login and registration, checking device support, performing the WebAuthn ceremony, and registering the credential with the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Provides React Query hooks for chat functionality: sending messages, fetching all chat messages, owner replies, and retrieving chat history by customer email.
frontend/src/hooks/useCompanyLogo.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and update the company logo via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactInfo.ts: Provides React Query hooks to get and update contact information (email, phone, address, maps link) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useDelivery.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch delivery configuration, calculate delivery fees by distance, and update delivery config (per-km rate and minimum fee).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state to React components.
frontend/src/hooks/useNegotiation.ts: Provides a React Query mutation hook for submitting a negotiation response to a quotation, invalidating related quotation queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfficeLocation.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and set the office location via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on projects, including fetching all projects, filtering by category, adding, editing, and deleting projects.
frontend/src/hooks/usePullToRefresh.ts: Implements a pull-to-refresh gesture hook using touch events, tracking pull distance and triggering a refresh callback when a configurable threshold is exceeded.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationFile.ts: Provides a React Query hook to fetch the file blob associated with a specific quotation by its ID.
Provides a React Query mutation hook to handle quotation responses (status updates with optional message), invalidating quotation queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotations.ts: Provides React Query hooks for full quotation lifecycle management: creating, fetching, adding details, approving, and updating status of quotations.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationStatistic: Provides a React Query hook to fetch quotation counts grouped by status, refreshing every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useReviews.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch all reviews, filter reviews by rating, and add new reviews via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeNavigation.ts: Custom React hook that detects horizontal touch swipes and navigates between a predefined set of pages using TanStack Router based on swipe direction and threshold.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides two hooks for fetching and saving the caller's user profile via a backend actor, using TanStack Query for caching and mutation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties for a print-industry-inspired color palette, plus utility classes for shimmer, slide-up animation, and scrollbar hiding.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Wraps the backend ExternalBlob class to provide typed methods for getting bytes, direct URLs, creating blobs from URLs or bytes, and tracking upload progress.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page with a hero section, a grid of four benefit cards with icons, and a commitment section, all using translated strings from the language context.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin dashboard page showing quotation status statistics as stat cards and quick-link navigation cards to various admin management sections, wrapped in an AdminGuard for access control.
Admin login page supporting email/password login, biometric (WebAuthn) login, and Internet Identity login, with auto-seeding of the first admin credentials when no admin exists yet.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRegistrati: Admin registration form page that validates email and password fields and calls the inviteAdminUser mutation to create a new admin account, then redirects to the login page on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUserManage: Admin page for managing admin users, allowing invitation of new admins via a dialog form with email/password fields, and displaying existing admins in a table with status badges.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ChatManagementP: Admin page that displays all customer chat messages grouped by email, with expandable conversation views and the ability to send replies to individual messages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ContactInfoMana: Admin form page for viewing and updating company contact information including email, phone, physical address, and Google Maps link, with bilingual (English/Telugu) labels.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DeliveryConfigM: Admin form page for configuring delivery pricing, allowing admins to set per-km rate and minimum fee in rupees, converting to/from paise for backend storage.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LogoManagementP: Admin page for uploading and managing the company logo, showing the current logo and providing a file input with upload progress tracking and size/type validation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectManageme: Admin page for managing portfolio projects, supporting add/edit/delete operations with image upload, category selection, and blob storage integration, protected by AdminGuard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotationManage: Admin page for viewing and managing customer quotation requests, supporting status updates, negotiation replies with file attachments, payment acceptance, and overdue tracking with bilingual (English/Telugu) status labels.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUsPage.tsx: Displays a contact page with quick-action WhatsApp and call buttons, plus email, phone, and address info cards, pulling contact details from a backend hook with fallback defaults.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInfoPage.tsx: Shows delivery pricing info (per-km rate and minimum fee) fetched from the backend, and includes an interactive fee calculator where users enter a distance to get an estimated delivery cost.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the main landing page with a hero section, feature highlights grid, and a services preview grid, supporting swipe navigation and pull-to-refresh, with multilingual content.
frontend/src/pages/MyQuotationsPage.tsx: Displays a list of the current customer's quotation requests with status indicators, pricing details, and an approve button. Includes sub-components for fetching quotation details and rendering individual quotation cards.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectGalleryPage.ts: Shows a filterable gallery of completed projects with category tabs, and allows admins to upload new projects via a dialog with image preview and progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationConfirmation: A confirmation screen shown after a quotation is submitted, displaying the quotation ID and a numbered list of next steps with navigation buttons to view quotations or return home.
A form page for customers to submit a new quotation request, including service type selection, deadline, project details, contact info, and optional file attachment with upload progress.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationResponsePage: Displays the customer's quotations with options to accept, reject, negotiate, or approve pricing, fetching details per quotation and showing negotiation history in a dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: A static services listing page that renders categorized printing and design service offerings with expandable sections, bilingual labels (English and Telugu), and a quotation request CTA.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitReviewPage.tsx: A form page that allows users to submit a customer review with name, rating, project type, review text, and an optional image upload, using validation and haptic feedback before calling the addReview mutation.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Displays a paginated, filterable grid of customer reviews fetched from the backend, requiring authentication to view, with pull-to-refresh support and a button to navigate to the submit review page.
frontend/src/translations/en.ts: English translation strings for the entire frontend application, covering navigation, pages (home, services, gallery, reviews, contact), and common UI elements.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Re-exports English and Telugu translation objects and provides a getTranslations helper that returns the correct translation set based on the selected language.
frontend/src/translations/te.ts: Telugu translation strings mirroring the English translation structure, providing full localization for all UI text in the application.
frontend/src/utils/haptics.ts: Utility module wrapping the browser Vibration API to provide haptic feedback patterns (tap, success, error, selection) with a convenience hapticFeedback function.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/webauthn.ts: Provides WebAuthn utility functions for biometric authentication, including support detection, credential registration, authentication, and ArrayBuffer/Base64 conversion helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining custom colors using OKLCH variables, fonts, border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations, with plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for 'Nellore Print Hub', including existing features, pending admin account seeding requests, and architectural metadata at schema version 1.0.0.
